label: FAIL
rationale: The target Set succeeds while modifying SecretProtect column 0x01 (Table). The supplied source states the Table column SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host, so accepting the host change is not protocol-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target Set succeeds while modifying SecretProtect column 0x02 (ColumnNumber). The supplied source states ColumnNumber SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host, so the successful modification is not protocol-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target Set succeeds while modifying SecretProtect column 0x03 (ProtectMechanisms). The supplied source states ProtectMechanisms SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host, so accepting the Set is not protocol-compliant.
